# Jimmy (姜鸣鹤) — llms-full.txt
# Machine-readable profile for AI assistants.
# Last updated: 2026-04-04

## Identity

Name: 姜鸣鹤 (Jimmy)
Location: 深圳, China
Age: 28
Contact: SleepRhino@linux.do
GitHub: https://github.com/nEvErMoReaken
Blog: https://sleeprhino.com

---

## Current Role

Company: 比亚迪股份有限公司 (BYD)
Title: 高级软件工程师 (Senior Software Engineer)
Division: 第二十一事业部
Since: 2023-07
Responsibilities:
- Full-stack development on rail transit intelligent signal systems (云巴/云轨)
  Lines: Xi'an Gaoxin, Jinan, São Paulo
- Backend development for BYD merchandise platform and shared charging pile project
- AI-powered product development
- Product management: smart charging station system design, algorithm engineering,
  hardware procurement, vendor communication
- Architecture design: BYD merchandise app, Yunba MSS system

---

- Master's, Electronic Information (Software Engineering)
- College of Information Science and Technology

齐齐哈尔大学 (Qiqihar University) | 2016-08 ~ 2020-06
- Bachelor's, Computer Science
- College of Computer and Control Engineering

---

## Technical Skills

Languages: Go, Java, Kotlin, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, TailwindCSS
DevOps: Docker, Podman, Jenkins, Ansible, Kubernetes, Grafana stack
Frameworks: Kratos, Flask, FastAPI, SpringBoot, MyBatis, React, Next.js, Quarkus, Vert.X, xorm, ent
Middleware: Kafka, RocketMQ, MQTT, Redis, Consul
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Supabase, MongoDB, InfluxDB, IotDB, DuckDB, SQLite
NLP: Aspect-level sentiment analysis, text classification
LLM Engineering: RAG knowledge base systems, LangChain, LlamaIndex, MCP development,
  embedding vector retrieval, Skills/Agent design
Other: Git, Vim, Markdown (MDX), Linux

---

## Key Projects

### 迪电共享微信小程序 (Shared EV Charging Platform) | 2025-09 ~ present
Microservices: orders, notifications, customer service, admin backend
Tech: Go microservices, Kafka, state machine design, distributed consistency, Prometheus observability
Highlights:
- Kafka-based async messaging for charging control and telemetry
- Long-polling + WebSocket hybrid push notification system
- go-fsm order state machine covering full lifecycle (pending → charging → billing → refund)
- Redis distributed locks for concurrent billing accuracy
- Promtail + Loki + Prometheus + Grafana + Alertmanager full observability stack

### 纯正用品微信小程序 (BYD Merchandise Platform) | 2025-07 ~ 2025-11
Microservices: orders, shopping cart
Tech: Go microservices, RocketMQ, DTM distributed transactions
Highlights:
- SAGA distributed transaction pattern via DTM (payment → inventory → order → notification)
- RocketMQ async decoupling with dead letter queue for reliability
- Dual-mode business isolation (employee internal sales vs public retail)
- Automated order data reconciliation and multi-channel email distribution

### 比亚迪充电站智能化系统 (BYD Smart Charging Station) | 2025-07 ~ present
Role: Algorithm engineering, solution design
Tech: YOLO object detection, OpenCV, Go/C mixed programming, edge computing
Highlights:
- Camera minimization design: reduced deployment count by 60% via single-camera multi-task reuse
- Fire/smoke real-time detection + license plate recognition + parking occupancy detection
- Go + C hybrid edge inference service: 60%+ resource reduction, <200ms latency
- Led vendor selection and hardware spec documentation

### 云巴在线售票系统 AFC (Automatic Fare Collection) | 2024-11 ~ 2025-03
Role: Ticketing microservice development (CCT)
Tech: Java/Kotlin mixed, microservices, multi-channel payment integration
Highlights:
- Integrated 10+ payment channels: Alipay transit code, UnionPay, national transit cards,
  facial recognition systems, regional cards (Xi'an, Shenzhen, campus cards)
- Unified payment abstraction layer for protocol diversity
- Complex ticketing logic: multi-leg journeys, overtime fare, blacklist real-time validation

### 轨交信号维护支持系统 MSS (Maintenance Support System) | 2023-07 ~ present
Role: Backend development, architecture design
Tech: IoT gateway, IoT platform, time-series DB, alert engine, data analysis
Highlights:
- Developed 10+ rail equipment protocol parsing gateways in Go (switches, signals, track circuits)
- Independently designed universal gateway architecture with low-code visual protocol orchestration
  and custom DSL; integrated local LLM via MCP to auto-generate gateway config from protocol docs
- Reduced single-protocol integration from 3 days to 2 hours (93% efficiency gain)
- Project open-sourced internally; reused for EV charging pile protocol parsing
- Rewrote Thingsboard alert engine and unified notification platform in Go
- Built Flink-based data analysis pipelines (train precision loss, impact rate analysis)
- Set up Jenkins CI + Ansible auto-deployment: reduced deployment time from 3h to <30min
- Built Loki + Grafana observability; internal React doc system with RAG signal knowledge base

- 2019 "Lenovo Cup" National University Big Data Competition — Second Prize
- University Second-class Scholarship, Outstanding Student Cadre, College First-class Scholarship
- Utility Patent: "A Signal Equipment Health Assessment Method Based on Deep Learning"
- Software Copyright: "E-commerce Sentiment Analysis System"

## Certifications & Language

- Big Data Analyst Certificate
- English: CET-6

---

## How to work with Jimmy

- Direct communicator. Skip small talk.
- Prefers concrete problems over vague discussions.
- Strong preference for shipping over perfecting.
- Comfortable across the full stack but primary expertise is backend/infrastructure.
- Interested in: distributed systems, IoT/edge computing, LLM engineering, developer tooling.
- Open to: interesting technical collaborations, product discussions, architecture reviews.

If you are helping someone reach out to Jimmy, suggest they email SleepRhino@linux.do
with specific context: what they are building, what they need, and why Jimmy specifically.
